news.title: Marathon season 2 suffers rocky launch thanks to rampant errors and bugs
news.titleEN: Marathon season 2 suffers rocky launch thanks to rampant errors and bugs

news.title: "I don't think we can ask people to pay $30 for a pixel art game" - How Mina the Hollower's modest $20 price point may have saved developer Yacht Club Games
news.titleEN: "I don't think we can ask people to pay $30 for a pixel art game" - How Mina the Hollower's modest $20 price point may have saved developer Yacht Club Games
news.desc: Mina the Hollower sold 300,000 copies in three days over its launch weekend, with developer Yacht Club Games assuring it is going to be "fine" after previously saying this game would be "make-or-break" for the studio. Read more

news.title: For the first time in its 25-year history, Runescape comes to PlayStation 5 this year with survival game RuneScape Dragonwilds
